policy: Drafts are listed only as planned slots until there is a real post, source file, or public LinkedIn URL.

slots.title: Agentic engineering, without the religious fog
slots.summary: How agents can be used as engineering instruments while source files, tests, reviews, and personal judgment stay in control.

slots.title: Static sites as public workbenches
slots.summary: Why this site behaves as a small OS surface instead of a recruiter funnel or generic portfolio stack.

slots.title: LinkedIn mirrors
slots.summary: Future public LinkedIn posts can be mirrored here with a short local summary and outbound URL.
